email: E tlameha ho ba aterese ea imeile e nepahetseng
minLength: E tlameha ho ba bonyane litlhaku tse {min}
maxLength: E tlameha ho se fete litlhaku tse {max}
url: E tlameha ho ba URL e nepahetseng
ipAddress: E tlameha ho ba aterese ea IP e nepahetseng
hostname: E tlameha ho ba lebitso la haolo le nepahetseng
